bolt.directive: Maintain current performance baseline. Await further architectural changes before considering new optimization tasks.

palette.directive: Ensure journal logs remain consistently clear and accessible for restricted services (neos-autoupdate.service, neos-liveuser-setup.service) to prevent debugging issues due to missing permissions resulting from recent sandboxing.

sentinel.directive: Audit all systemd sandboxing directives in neos-autoupdate.service and neos-liveuser-setup.service. Ensure absolutely no critical privileges are granted unnecessarily, and thoroughly verify that ReadWritePaths are strictly minimal and appropriate.

note: Tasks specifically triggered by No-build day (strategic pause) to clear validation debt.
